title: Shrek's Pack (Discontinued)
description: my modpack is designed to provide a more refined and enjoyable vanilla Minecraft experience by introducing well-thought-out enhancements and features while preserving the fundamental aspects that make Minecraft so beloved by players.
body:
- ### This Pack Has Been Discontinued, Check Out My New Pack [FunkyClient](https://modrinth.com/modpack/funkyclient)

![Banner with swamp scene](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/bn5HWvo3/images/0677065561a87d58c80a60f88c7a739bd838663e.png)

![Images for front page](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/bn5HWvo3/images/71b2bb5f590d55ef0573e7392c6fc8e706aa30ba.png)

![Images for front page](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/bn5HWvo3/images/398c2e4199515fadb4c31cd337aad4b356b6cc14.png)

![Images for front page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bn5HWvo3/images/e17ecb83e7e05c0428df1da9646f4b893dc3d8db.png)

<details>
<summary>some of the optimization mods</summary>

- ImmediatelyFast
- DashLoader
- Language Reload
- ModernFix
- Model Gap Fix
- Sodium
- Iris Shaders
- Lithium
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- Advanced UI Scaling

</details>

<details>
<summary>some of the decorative mods</summary>

- Iris Shaders
- Continuity
- LambDynamicLights
- BetterF3
- Not Enough Animations
- 3D Skin Layers
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- Falling Leaves
- Animatica
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- OptiGUI
- Wavey Capes
- Blur (Fabric)
- Chat Heads
- Make Bubbles Pop
- Prism
- Legendary Tooltips
- First-person Model
- Cosmetica
- Status Effect Bars
- Wakes
- Explosive Enhancement

</details>

<details>
<summary>Some utility mods</summary>

- Mod Menu
- Simple Voice Chat
- AppleSkin
- Zoomify
- Borderless Mining
- Borderless Mining
- Xaero's World Map
- ESSENTIAL Mod
- FabricSkyboxes
- Animatica
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Better Statistics Screen
- Better Statistics Screen
- MidnightControls
- Mouse Tweaks
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright)
- Durability Viewer

</details>
